retry_reason: The operation is unconditional and always succeeds; retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: This function releases (puts) references to device nodes associated with the CPU and codec DAI links of a sound card. It is intended for cleanup, typically during driver removal or error handling. The caller must ensure the card structure and DAI links are valid. After this function, the device nodes' refcounts are decremented; the caller must not use those nodes afterwards unless another reference is held (e.g., from an earlier of_node_get). No locking is required inside the function, as of_node_put is thread-safe.

judge.reason: The function iterates over all DAI links and unconditionally calls of_node_put on the CPU and codec device nodes. Its sole purpose is to decrement the reference counts of these nodes as part of cleanup; there is no additional business logic.
